title: WeChat app keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant.description: WeChat App ID from environment variable

compliant.code:
// Use secure vault for WeChat Pay credentials
const mchId = await vault.getSecret('wechat-pay-mch-id')
compliant.description: WeChat Pay credentials from secure vault

checks.message: WeChat App ID detected. This identifier grants access to WeChat Mini Program, Official Account, or WeChat Pay services. Unauthorized access can lead to account takeover, financial fraud, and service abuse. IMMEDIATELY revoke this App ID from your WeChat developer console and rotate credentials. Use environment variables or secure secret management systems for storage.

WeChat App Secret detected. This secret grants full access to WeChat API services including Mini Programs, Official Accounts, and WeChat Pay. Unauthorized access can lead to complete account compromise, financial fraud, and user data breaches. IMMEDIATELY revoke this secret from your WeChat developer console and rotate credentials.

WeChat Pay Merchant ID detected. This identifier provides access to WeChat Pay merchant services and financial transactions. Unauthorized access can lead to payment fraud, financial loss, and transaction manipulation. IMMEDIATELY secure this merchant ID and review payment configurations in your WeChat Pay merchant console.
